info.title: Matador API
info.description: Matador on-demand car rental API. Customer endpoints use JWT bearer tokens; admin endpoints use session cookies.

post.description: Handle Stripe payment events.
Handle identity verification events.

get.description: Status of the latest verification session.

post.description: Begin an identity verification session; returns a client_secret.
Submit an inspection with all photo URLs.
Get a presigned upload URL for a photo angle.
Customer reports an incident on a trip.
End the active trip (awaiting dropoff inspection).
Attach a confirmed payment method to the customer.
Mark a payment method as default.
Begin saving a card; returns client_secret.
Save a new address.
Create a booking from a quote; places a deposit hold.
Cancel per the cancellation policy.
Get a quote without creating a booking.
Create a customer account and return tokens.

409.description: Email or phone already in use

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for new tokens.
Authenticate with email and password.
Create a zone from a GeoJSON polygon.
Add a vehicle to the fleet.
Send an unlock command via telematics.
Validated vehicle status transition.
Send a lock command via telematics.
Create a vehicle class.
Close after inspection; computes final charges.
Add a pricing rate for a vehicle class.
Create a promo code.
Record a manual ledger adjustment.
Mark an inspection passed or flagged.
Staff creates an incident.
Admin-initiated cancellation.
Assign a specific vehicle to a booking.
Activate a confirmed booking; starts a trip.
Invalidate the current staff session.
Authenticate a staff member; sets a session cookie.

patch.description: Update name and phone. Email and date of birth are immutable.
Update fees, dropoff policy, or active flag.
Suspend, deactivate, or reactivate a customer.

get.description: RSA public key set for verifying customer JWTs.
Which zone (if any) contains a point.
Bookable classes with counts and starting price for a window/location.
A single trip owned by the customer.
The customer's active trip, if any.
A single booking owned by the customer.
All ledger entries for a trip.
Paginated ledger history for a customer.
